corrections_2026_07_03b.storage: NO HEVC anywhere. Imported media stores processed depth directly: custom binary (quantized UInt16 depth planes + LZ4, mmap); format finalized at import phase. depth.mov/color.mov removed.
corrections_2026_07_03b.default_setup: front TrueDepth + back LiDAR live = the default pinout: default shape pushed forward + stem arms connecting pins to the Z-origin wall; no-signal pins rest at Z origin; normal timing
corrections_2026_07_03b.navigation: swipe left on right edge of PLAY -> node view; swipe right on left edge of node view -> PLAY
corrections_2026_07_03b.import_view: contextual only - opens from tapping the source, not a destination
corrections_2026_07_03b.node_inspector: bottom settings bar in node view is PERMANENT, not collapsible
corrections_2026_07_03b.mvp: build MVP first: TrueDepth + LiDAR live pinout on-device (30k default / 307200 max), screens visible even if non-functional; node engine after

source: 25 AskUserQuestion rounds + research workflows w7lv877px (TDLidar survey), wktdws96b (models/deployment/storage/engine/topology)

platform.devices: iPhone A17 Pro and newer only
platform.ipad: runs scaled iPhone layout v1; native layout fast-follow
platform.sharing: graph-only share codes (text/QR), no media payload
platform.name: Points (working title)
platform.thermal: auto ladder LOD->count->fps with HUD notice + Marathon mode pre-cap (100k/30fps); recording resolution locked mid-file

sources.media_import: RGB video/photo -> one-time on-device ML bake -> stored depth, looped playback
sources.video_model_fast: Depth Anything V2 metric ViT-S indoor/outdoor (already converted, 47MB)
sources.photo_model: MoGe-2 ViT-B Normal (MIT) - already converted at /Users/ari/Downloads/MoGe2_ViTB_Normal_504.mlpackage (202MB)
sources.model_warmup: compile on first import (Preparing engine state)
sources.bake_polish: always-on: inverse-depth scale/shift alignment + motion-gated EMA + scene-cut resets, baked into stored depth
sources.bake_ux: foreground + BGContinuedProcessingTask continuation + ActivityKit Live Activity ring in Dynamic Island
sources.clip_limits: soft cap ~5min with size/ETA warning; per-project size meter; excluded from iCloud backup
sources.bad_bakes: no preview gate - import lands, user judges in editor
sources.intrinsics: EXIF -> MoGe-2 FOV estimate -> 60 deg default; fov param on Source node

storage.format: lossy HEVC only (user: files too big for lossless)
storage.depth: depth.mov HEVC Main10 GOP-compressed, log-encoded luma, blue-noise dither, ~10-15MB/min

playback.engine: simple sequential looper (VTDecompressionSession ring, no AVPlayer)
playback.source_node: one switchable Source node (front/back/media), identical ports, graceful fallback chain LiDAR->TrueDepth->demo clip

render.stem: full system: per-pin on/off, profile (match/cylinder/blade), thickness+taper fields, color gradient
render.z_semantics: Z=0 wall; near pulls toward camera; holes retract to 0; gain/curve via nodes
render.shading: node-editable: unlit/lit/matcap; 2 Light nodes full params (drivable positions incl. head/hand follow); 1 cheap shadow map on light 1
render.depth_blend: depth buffer opaque-first default + ghost mode via RenderSettings node
render.camera: fixed; Camera node = presets (Front/3-4L/3-4R/High/Low/Side) + FOV + dolly + drivable +/-15deg offsets, spring-smoothed, never gesture-driven

grid.base_grid: 200x150=30k rect default, corners pinned to 3:4; max 307200 (=480x640)
grid.morphing: same-count position blend + hard switch, triggerable by gestures/audio/midi/osc/lighting/any driver
grid.anti_wobble: layered filter stack AS NODES (deadband + adaptive EMA + optional Z quantize); XY fixed by construction
grid.holes: retract to Z=0 default; node-selectable policy (retract/hold/hide/fill)

engine.runtime: hybrid compile: per-pin chains -> generated Metal kernels; control nodes CPU-interpreted
engine.zero_stutter: resident interpreter kernel (next-frame edits) + async specialized kernels + MTLBinaryArchive cache (Dolphin hybrid pattern)
engine.granularity: fields AND operator families, own names (no TOPS/CHOPS)
engine.v1_restriction: per-pin ops only - no neighbor/blur/propagation (analytic radial allowed)
engine.state: state-slot allocator, preallocated pool ~32 floats x 307k, UI memory meter, pending-reset discipline

tracking.stack: Vision 2D on RGB frames (body 19 joints, hands 21x2, face 76 landmarks + pose); no ARKit face session
tracking.regions: GPU region-mask field + raw Joint nodes (both)

io.midi: USB + Network + BLE v1; clock v2
io.audio: ported TDLidar analyzer (bass/mid/high, 3 onsets, burst, 20-band FFT, RMS) + mic/USB picker
io.clock: global BPM transport + tap tempo; sync divisions on time nodes
io.recording: one-tap -> auto Photos; GPU-direct HEVC up to 2880x3840@60; live editing while recording

node_editor.views: PLAY <-> PATCH via PATCH button + swipe; patch fullscreen over live output
node_editor.bg_blend: focus-driven (selected solid, unselected ~40%) + persistent dim slider + tap-empty peek
node_editor.params: tap node -> bottom inspector; collapsed strip + scrub-anywhere
node_editor.add_node: double-tap -> palette at point (search + family tabs + recents); drag-wire-to-empty prefiltered
node_editor.macros: v1: collapse to macro, exposed ports, user library, 2-level nesting
node_editor.undo: full history + param coalescing; 2-finger undo / 3-finger redo
node_editor.wires: reroute dots + wireless Send/Receive pairs + tap-to-highlight
node_editor.driver_assign: wires + quick-map overlay (incl. MIDI learn); inserts real nodes behind the scenes
node_editor.envelopes: AR envelope + slew + spring value nodes as motion vocabulary

ui.theme: dual gray Blender-like: dark #474646 / light #BCBCBC; family colors + 1px outlines on nodes and wires
ui.node_look: solid header+body when selected/focused; translucent when not (Blender focus model)
ui.font: decide later - shortlist Inter / Space Grotesk / Archivo, chosen in HTML mockup
ui.accordion: top-right vertical pill stack (NDI/Record/SwitchCam/Settings), status dots collapsed
ui.deck: 5 control types (knob/fader/pad/xy/picker), 4x2 swipeable pages, long-press rearrange
ui.starter_deck: Pin Count / Pin Size / Depth Gain / Shape Morph / Palette / Bloom
ui.viewport_touch: node input only (3-slot Touch node), never camera
ui.browser: square grid + live thumbnails + templates shelf

templates.teaching: 3-5 annotated stickies per template + openable factory macros
